entry.name: Tegile_IntelliFlash_Pools_API
entry.description: Monitors Tegile Pools usage/performance stats information + Pool disk type statistics (per Disk Type)

attribute.name: scriptgroovy

datapoint.name: usedByDataAndSnapshot
datapoint.description: Amount used by data and snapshot after compression and deduplication (bytes).

datapoint.name: available
datapoint.description: Amount of available space left on the pool (bytes).

datapoint.name: compressionSavingsPercentage
datapoint.description: Amount saved from compression as a percentage.

datapoint.name: dedupeSavingsPercentage
datapoint.description: Amount saved from deduplication as a percentage.

datapoint.name: originalUsedByDataAndSnapshot
datapoint.description: Original used by data and snapshot before compression and deduplication (bytes).

datapoint.name: totalMetaSize
datapoint.description: Total metadata size (bytes).

datapoint.name: totalPoolSize
datapoint.description: Total size of the pool (bytes).

datapoint.name: totalSavingsPercentage
datapoint.description: Amount saved from compression and deduplication as a percentage.

datapoint.name: usedByAll
datapoint.description: Amount used for data and reservation (bytes).

datapoint.name: usedByData
datapoint.description: Amount used by data after compression and deduplication (bytes).

datapoint.name: usedByReservation
datapoint.description: Amount used by reservation (bytes).

datapoint.name: usedBySnapshot
datapoint.description: Amount used by snapshot after compression and deduplication (bytes).

datapoint.name: usedMeta
datapoint.description: Used metadata (bytes).

datapoint.name: poolStorageUtilizationPercentage
datapoint.alertbody:
Pool ##INSTANCE## on Tegile Array ##HOST## has reported that ##VALUE## % of its storage capacity is now utilized, placing the pool into ##LEVEL## state.
This started at ##START##, -- or ##DURATION## ago.
datapoint.description: Percentage of pool storage capacity utilized.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_CacheDisk_Read_Latency
datapoint.description:
Cache Disk -> SSDs designated as read/write cache.
Average disk read operation latency, in milliseconds.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_CacheDisk_Read_MBps
datapoint.description:
Cache Disk -> SSDs designated as read/write cache.
Read data throughput, in megabytes/sec.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_CacheDisk_Read_Ops
datapoint.description:
Cache Disk -> SSDs designated as read/write cache.
Disk data read operations per second.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_CacheDisk_Write_Latency
datapoint.description:
Cache Disk -> SSDs designated as read/write cache.
Average disk write operation latency, in milliseconds.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_CacheDisk_Write_MBps
datapoint.description:
Cache Disk -> SSDs designated as read/write cache.
Write data throughput, in megabytes/sec.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_CacheDisk_Write_Ops
datapoint.description:
Cache Disk -> SSDs designated as read/write cache.
Disk data write operations per second.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_DataDisk_Read_Latency
datapoint.description:
Data Disk -> Disks used for data-only. HDDs in hybrid pools.
Average disk read operation latency, in milliseconds.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_DataDisk_Read_MBps
datapoint.description:
Data Disk -> Disks used for data-only. HDDs in hybrid pools.
Read data throughput, in megabytes/sec.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_DataDisk_Read_Ops
datapoint.description:
Data Disk -> Disks used for data-only. HDDs in hybrid pools.
Disk data read operations per second.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_DataDisk_Write_Latency
datapoint.description:
Data Disk -> Disks used for data-only. HDDs in hybrid pools.
Average disk write operation latency, in milliseconds.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_DataDisk_Write_MBps
datapoint.description:
Data Disk -> Disks used for data-only. HDDs in hybrid pools.
Write data throughput, in megabytes/sec.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_DataDisk_Write_Ops
datapoint.description:
Data Disk -> Disks used for data-only. HDDs in hybrid pools.
Disk data write operations per second.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_IflashDisk_Read_Latency
datapoint.description:
Iflash Disk -> SSD disk type housing metadata and cache.
Average disk read operation latency, in milliseconds.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_IflashDisk_Read_MBps
datapoint.description:
Iflash Disk -> SSD disk type housing metadata and cache.
Read data throughput, in megabytes/sec.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_IflashDisk_Read_Ops
datapoint.description:
Iflash Disk -> SSD disk type housing metadata and cache.
Disk data read operations per second.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_IflashDisk_Write_Latency
datapoint.description:
Iflash Disk -> SSD disk type housing metadata and cache.
Average disk write operation latency, in milliseconds.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_IflashDisk_Write_MBps
datapoint.description:
Iflash Disk -> SSD disk type housing metadata and cache.
Write data throughput, in megabytes/sec.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_IflashDisk_Write_Ops
datapoint.description:
Iflash Disk -> SSD disk type housing metadata and cache.
Disk data write operations per second.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_MetaDisk_Read_Latency
datapoint.description:
Meta Disk -> SSDs designated for metadata only.
Average disk read operation latency, in milliseconds.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_MetaDisk_Read_MBps
datapoint.description:
Meta Disk -> SSDs designated for metadata only.
Read data throughput, in megabytes/sec.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_MetaDisk_Read_Ops
datapoint.description:
Meta Disk -> SSDs designated for metadata only.
Disk data read operations per second.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_MetaDisk_Write_Latency
datapoint.description:
Meta Disk -> SSDs designated for metadata only.
Average disk write operation latency, in milliseconds.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_MetaDisk_Write_MBps
datapoint.description:
Meta Disk -> SSDs designated for metadata only.
Write data throughput, in megabytes/sec.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_MetaDisk_Write_Ops
datapoint.description:
Meta Disk -> SSDs designated for metadata only.
Disk data write operations per second.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_Pool_Average_Latency
datapoint.description: Average pool read/write operation latency, in milliseconds.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_Pool_Read_Latency
datapoint.description: Average pool read operation latency, in milliseconds.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_Pool_Read_MBps
datapoint.description: Storage pool data reads, in megabytes/sec.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_Pool_Read_Ops
datapoint.description: Pool read operations per second.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_Pool_Total_MBps
datapoint.description: Storage pool data write/read, in megabytes/sec.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_Pool_Total_Ops
datapoint.description: Pool read/write operations per second.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_Pool_Write_Latency
datapoint.description: Average pool write operation latency, in milliseconds.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_Pool_Write_MBps
datapoint.description: Storage pool data reads, in megabytes/sec.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_Pool_Write_Ops
datapoint.description: Pool read operations per second.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_CacheDisk_Read_Bytes
datapoint.description: Read data throughput, in bytes/sec.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_CacheDisk_Write_Bytes
datapoint.description: Write data throughput, in bytes/sec.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_DataDisk_Read_Bytes
datapoint.description: Read data throughput, in bytes/sec.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_DataDisk_Write_Bytes
datapoint.description: Write data throughput, in bytes/sec.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_IflashDisk_Read_Bytes
datapoint.description: Read data throughput, in bytes/sec.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_IflashDisk_Write_Bytes
datapoint.description: Write data throughput, in bytes/sec.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_MetaDisk_Read_Bytes
datapoint.description: Read data throughput, in bytes/sec.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_MetaDisk_Write_Bytes
datapoint.description: Write data throughput, in bytes/sec.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_Pool_Total_Bytes
datapoint.description: Storage pool data write/read, in bytes/sec.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_Pool_Read_Bytes
datapoint.description: Storage pool data reads, in bytes/sec.

datapoint.name: PerformanceStats_Pool_Write_Bytes
datapoint.description: Storage pool data writes, in bytes/sec.

datapoint.name: usedByData_Percentage
datapoint.description: Amount used by data after compression and deduplication (percent).

datapoint.name: usedByDataAndSnapshot_Percentage
datapoint.description: Amount used by data and snapshot after compression and deduplication (percent).

datapoint.name: usedByReservation_Percentage
datapoint.description: Amount used by reservation (percent).

datapoint.name: usedBySnapshot_Percentage
datapoint.description: Amount used by snapshot after compression and deduplication (percent).

datapoint.name: usedMeta_Percentage
datapoint.description: Used metadata (percent).
